raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX i was notified of a purchase, which is did not make. The purchase was for {$980.00} in XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX. I immediately called and canceled my card and they sent a new one which I have yet to activate. The fraud department later said I made this purchase with my chip card in XXXX, I said that's impossible since I have never been to XXXX and I still have the card. So they said I'm responsible. I called XXXX and of course it shows no such purchase in my history. I believe citi has some sort of a security breach making it look like customers are using their chip cards and they are denying it. I have yet to get any resolution but billing still looking into it. Hoping you as a consumer protector can do something about this thank you, XXXX.
